Package cc.quaternion.potshaper

Class PotAudio

java.lang.Object
cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotElement
cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotAudio
All Implemented Interfaces:
IPotElement
public class PotAudio extends PotElement
Represents an audio element embedded within a presentation slide.

This class provides a fluent API to configure audio playback properties such as auto-play, looping, volume, and icon visibility. It supports common audio formats like MP3, WAV, and AAC. All configuration methods ensure the underlying presentation is open for modification and update the associated Apache POI shape accordingly. Instances of this class are typically created by PotSlide.addAudio(byte[], java.lang.String) and are not intended to be instantiated directly.

Usage Example


 PotAudio audio = slide.addAudio(audioBytes, "audio/mp3")
     .at(50, 50)
     .size(50, 50)
     .autoPlay(true)
     .loop(true)
     .volume(0.8);
Since:
1.0
Author:
Quaternion8192

    Constructors

    Description
    PotAudio(org.apache.poi.xslf.usermodel.XSLFPictureShape shape, PotSlide parentSlide, String uuid)

  • Constructor Details

    • PotAudio

      public PotAudio(org.apache.poi.xslf.usermodel.XSLFPictureShape shape, PotSlide parentSlide, String uuid)
      Constructs a new audio element wrapper.

      This constructor is intended for internal use by the library. Audio elements should be created via PotSlide.addAudio(byte[], java.lang.String).

      Parameters:
      shape - the underlying Apache POI picture shape representing the audio
      parentSlide - the parent slide containing this audio element
      uuid - the unique identifier for this element

  • Method Details

    • autoPlay

      public PotAudio autoPlay(boolean autoPlay)
      Enables or disables automatic playback of the audio when the slide is shown.

      When set to true, the audio will start playing as soon as the slide appears during a slideshow. This setting is applied to the underlying presentation shape.

      Parameters:
      autoPlay - true to enable auto-play, false to disable it
      Returns:
      this audio element for method chaining

    • loop

      public PotAudio loop(boolean loop)
      Enables or disables continuous looping of the audio.

      When looping is enabled, the audio will restart from the beginning each time it finishes playing. This setting is applied to the underlying presentation shape.

      Parameters:
      loop - true to enable looping, false to disable it
      Returns:
      this audio element for method chaining

    • volume

      public PotAudio volume(double volume)
      Sets the playback volume for the audio.

      The volume is specified as a value between 0.0 (silent) and 1.0 (maximum volume). Values outside this range will be clamped. This setting is applied to the underlying presentation shape.

      Parameters:
      volume - the playback volume, between 0.0 and 1.0 inclusive
      Returns:
      this audio element for method chaining
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the volume is not a valid percentage

    • hideIcon

      public PotAudio hideIcon(boolean hideIcon)
      Shows or hides the audio icon on the slide.

      When the icon is hidden, the audio control interface is not visible on the slide, though the audio remains functional if triggered by auto-play or other actions. This setting is applied to the underlying presentation shape.

      Parameters:
      hideIcon - true to hide the audio icon, false to show it
      Returns:
      this audio element for method chaining

    • isAutoPlay

      public boolean isAutoPlay()
      Returns whether the audio is set to play automatically.
      Returns:
      true if auto-play is enabled, false otherwise

    • isLoop

      public boolean isLoop()
      Returns whether the audio is set to loop continuously.
      Returns:
      true if looping is enabled, false otherwise

    • getVolume

      public double getVolume()
      Returns the current playback volume.
      Returns:
      the volume value, between 0.0 and 1.0 inclusive

    • isIconHidden

      public boolean isIconHidden()
      Returns whether the audio icon is hidden.
      Returns:
      true if the icon is hidden, false otherwise

    • at

      public PotAudio at(double x, double y)
      Sets the position of this audio element on the slide.

      The coordinates are specified in points relative to the top-left corner of the slide. This method updates the underlying shape and returns this audio element for chaining.

      Overrides:
      at in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      x - the horizontal position in points
      y - the vertical position in points
      Returns:
      this audio element for method chaining
      See Also:
      • PotElement.at(double, double)

      Sets the X-coordinate of the element.
      Overrides:

      Parameters:
      x - the new X-coordinate, in points
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

      public PotAudio size(double width, double height)
      Sets the size of this audio element.

      The dimensions are specified in points. This method updates the underlying shape and returns this audio element for chaining.

      Overrides:
      size in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      width - the width in points
      height - the height in points
      Returns:
      this audio element for method chaining

      Overrides:

      Parameters:

      Returns:

      Scales the element independently along the X and Y axes.

      scaleY - the vertical scaling factor; must be positive
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • rotate

      public PotAudio rotate(double angle)
      Sets the rotation angle of this audio element.

      The angle is specified in degrees clockwise. This method updates the underlying shape and returns this audio element for chaining.

      Overrides:
      rotate in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      angle - the rotation angle in degrees
      Returns:
      this audio element for method chaining
      See Also:
      • PotElement.rotate(double)

      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Sets the rotation angle of the element (fluent builder alias).
      Overrides:
      rotation in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      angle - the rotation angle in degrees
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • rotateBy

      public PotAudio rotateBy(double deltaAngle)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Rotates the element by the specified angle delta.

      Rotation is only applied to simple shapes; other shape types are unaffected.

      Overrides:
      rotateBy in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      deltaAngle - the angle to add to the current rotation, in degrees
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • flipHorizontal

      public PotAudio flipHorizontal()
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Toggles the horizontal flip state of the element.

      Flipping is only applied to simple shapes; other shape types are unaffected.

      Overrides:
      flipHorizontal in class PotElement
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • flipVertical

      public PotAudio flipVertical()
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Toggles the vertical flip state of the element.

      Flipping is only applied to simple shapes; other shape types are unaffected.

      Overrides:
      flipVertical in class PotElement
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • bringToFront

      public PotAudio bringToFront()
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Brings this element to the front of the slide's drawing order.

      This operation manipulates the underlying XML structure of the slide.

      Overrides:
      bringToFront in class PotElement
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • sendToBack

      public PotAudio sendToBack()
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Sends this element to the back of the slide's drawing order.

      This method uses internal XML manipulation because Apache POI does not provide a direct API for zorder changes.

      Overrides:
      sendToBack in class PotElement
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • bringForward

      public PotAudio bringForward()
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Brings this element one step forward in the slide's drawing order.

      This method uses internal XML manipulation because Apache POI does not provide a direct API for zorder changes.

      Overrides:
      bringForward in class PotElement
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • sendBackward

      public PotAudio sendBackward()
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Sends this element one step backward in the slide's drawing order.

      This method uses internal XML manipulation because Apache POI does not provide a direct API for zorder changes.

      Overrides:
      sendBackward in class PotElement
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • animate

      public PotAudio animate(PotAnimation animation)
      Applies an animation to this audio element.

      The animation is defined by a PotAnimation object and will be played during the slideshow. This method returns this audio element for chaining.

      Overrides:
      animate in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      animation - the animation to apply
      Returns:
      this audio element for method chaining
      See Also:
      • PotElement.animate(PotAnimation)

    • duplicate

      public PotAudio duplicate()
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Creates a copy of this element on the same slide.

      Supported element types

      • PotShape geometric shapes
      • PotTextBox text boxes
      • PotImage images
      • PotTable tables
      • PotConnector connector lines

      Other element types such as PotAudio or PotVideo are not supported and will throw a PotException.

      Usage Example

      
 PotTextBox original = slide.addTextBox("Original");
 PotTextBox copy = original.duplicate();
 copy.setText("Copy").move(100, 0);
      Specified by:
      duplicate in interface IPotElement
      Overrides:
      duplicate in class PotElement
      Returns:
      a new element that is a duplicate of this one

    • removeAnimation

      public PotAudio removeAnimation()
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Removes any animation attached to this element.
      Overrides:
      removeAnimation in class PotElement
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • hyperlink

      public PotAudio hyperlink(String url)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Attaches a hyperlink to this element that points to an external URL.

      Hyperlinks are only applicable to simple shapes; other shape types are unaffected.

      Overrides:
      hyperlink in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      url - the destination URL; must not be null
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • hyperlink

      public PotAudio hyperlink(PotHyperlink link)
      Applies a hyperlink to this audio element.

      The hyperlink is defined by a PotHyperlink object. Clicking the audio during the slideshow will trigger the hyperlink. This method returns this audio element for chaining.

      Overrides:
      hyperlink in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      link - the hyperlink to apply
      Returns:
      this audio element for method chaining
      See Also:
      • PotElement.hyperlink(PotHyperlink)

    • hyperlinkToSlide

      public PotAudio hyperlinkToSlide(int slideIndex)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Creates a hyperlink that jumps to a specific slide within the same presentation.

      This method sets both the internal slide reference and a fallback address string. Hyperlinks are only applicable to simple shapes; other shape types are unaffected.

      Overrides:
      hyperlinkToSlide in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      slideIndex - the zerobased index of the target slide
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • removeHyperlink

      public PotAudio removeHyperlink()
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Removes any hyperlink attached to this element.

      This method manipulates the underlying XML because Apache POI does not provide a direct removal API. Hyperlinks are only applicable to simple shapes; other shape types are unaffected.

      Overrides:
      removeHyperlink in class PotElement
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • action

      public PotAudio action(PotAction action)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Attaches an action (e.g., mouseclick or mouseover) to the element.
      Overrides:

      Parameters:
      action - the action configuration
      Returns:

      public PotAudio removeAction(boolean isHover)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Removes an action from the element.
      Overrides:
      removeAction in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      isHover - true to remove a mouseover action, false to remove a mouseclick action
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • shadow

      public PotAudio shadow(PotShadow shadow)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Applies a shadow effect to the element.

      Shadows are only applicable to simple shapes; other shape types are unaffected. Passing null or a shadow of type PotShadow.Type.NONE removes any existing shadow.

      Overrides:
      shadow in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      shadow - the shadow configuration, or null to remove the shadow
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Removes any shadow effect from the element.
      Overrides:
      removeShadow in class PotElement
      Returns:

    • lighting

      public PotAudio lighting(Pot3DFormat.Lighting lighting)
      Description copied from class: PotElement

      lighting in class PotElement
      Parameters:

      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • opacity

      public PotAudio opacity(double opacity)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Sets the opacity (transparency) of the element.

      Opacity is applied by manipulating the underlying XML, as Apache POI does not provide a direct API. The value must be between 0.0 (fully transparent) and 1.0 (fully opaque).

      Overrides:
      opacity in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      opacity - the opacity value between 0.0 (transparent) and 1.0 (opaque)
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining
